summary: Tested admin-initiated password reset link flow and product layout changes (card_description removal). All 14 backend tests pass and all frontend UI tests pass.

minor.issue: Returns mocked:false (not mocked:true as review_request suggests). This is because Zoho Mail is configured as active email provider - emails are actually being sent, not mocked. This is correct behavior, just a discrepancy with the mocked_api note.

issues: card_description 'CD1' still shows on the product card in the store listing page - this appears intentional as the fix was only for the product detail page layouts (ShowcaseLayout, ApplicationLayout hero/intro)

critical_code_review_comments: email_service.py _TEMPLATES list: admin_password_reset template correctly defined with {{reset_link}} variable, 'Set New Password' button in HTML body, and 1-hour expiry warning.
customers.py: build reset_link correctly uses APP_URL + /forgot-password?email=...&code=...&partner=... format with URL encoding via urllib.parse.quote.
users.py: same pattern as customers.py for admin users reset link.

ForgotPassword.tsx: useSearchParams hook correctly extracts email, code, partner from URL. Initial step state uses urlEmail && urlCode condition correctly. Code field is hidden when urlCode is truthy. Header shows 'Set new password' when urlCode present.
ShowcaseLayout.tsx: Hero section only uses product.tagline (no card_description). PASS.
ApplicationLayout.tsx: Overview section uses product.tagline then description_long. No card_description. PASS.
ProductHero.tsx: Uses product.tagline || product.short_description (not description_long). PASS.
NOTE: The test product has tagline=null, so the hero shows only the product name in showcase layout - this is expected behavior.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Active email provider is Zoho Mail (not mocked). admin_password_reset template is at top of Email Templates list. Product 'Sample Service1' uses showcase layout with tagline=null, card_description='CD1', description_long='DPD1'. The forgot-password URL params flow (?email=x&code=y&partner=z) skips to the set-password step directly with header 'Set new password' and hidden code field.

live_test_results.email_templates_tab_shows_admin_password: PASS - 'Admin-Initiated Password Reset' template with trigger 'admin_password_reset' appears at TOP of email templates list
live_test_results.template_description_mentions_link: PASS - Description: 'Contains a direct link to set a new password'
live_test_results.forgot_password_url_params_skip_to_reset: PASS - ?email=x&code=y&partner=z goes directly to set-password step
live_test_results.code_field_hidden_when_url_code: PASS - Code input field NOT rendered when code present in URL
live_test_results.header_shows_set_new_password: PASS - h1 shows 'Set new password' (not 'Forgot password?')
live_test_results.only_password_fields_shown: PASS - New password + Confirm password fields shown, no code field
live_test_results.showcase_layout_no_card_description: PASS - 'CD1' (card_description) not shown on product detail page
live_test_results.showcase_hero_shows_tagline_or_empty: PASS - Hero shows only product name (tagline is null so nothing extra in hero)
live_test_results.product_hero_no_description_long: PASS - ProductHero.tsx code uses tagline||short_description only
live_test_results.send_password_reset_link_button: PASS - Button visible in SECURITY ACTIONS section of customer edit modal
live_test_results.send_password_reset_link_success: PASS - 'Password reset link sent successfully' toast shown after click
